title: solenanthus atlanticus
intro: Solenanthus atlanticus, also known as the Atlantic solenanthus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Solenanthus atlanticus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
